name: Barack Obama
subject: The story of Hamilton
body:
This was pretty cool -- even for my girls. | Friend --

It’s pretty hard to convince my girls that anything their mom and I like can possibly be considered cool.

But there is at least one big exception to this: Seven years ago, Michelle and I invited Lin-Manuel Miranda to the White House for our inaugural Poetry Jam and got to be among the first to get a taste of the phenomenon that would become _Hamilton_.

Today, _Hamilton_ is a record-breaking smash hit musical and the #1 rap album in the country -- and a civics lesson like we’ve never seen before, generating new and important conversations about who we are as a country and just what our American experiment is all about. **[And if you enter right now, you could get to see it for yourself.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU4MzczODkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODI0MDE0OTM1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

_Hamilton_ is a story for all of us, about all of us. It is a show as diverse as America itself. You’ll walk away from the theater truly understanding that what our founders started was just that: a start. As Alexander Hamilton says, America really is a great unfinished symphony.

We're getting ready to write our next chapter when we elect Hillary this November. As part of this campaign, you’re helping keep the story alive.

**Get even closer to that history -- be in the room where it happens -- by joining Hillary at a performance of _Hamilton_ next month. All you need to do is enter:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU4MzczODkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODI0MDE0OTM1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
I’m rooting for you -- because I know you’re going to love this.

Barack

subject: ICYMI – Lisman’s increasing desperation
body:
| | | Lisman's increasing desperation
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive2.com/?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=13e5151f0a&e=19cebfe173)
---
| |
---
| Greetings,
---
| In Case You Missed It:

The Rutland Herald recently outlined Bruce Lisman’s increasingly desperate tactics as his campaign fails to gain traction.

You can read the full article [**HERE**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=77c7c9ee1e&e=19cebfe173)

Earlier this week, Lisman called for 3 one-on-one debates. As the article correctly points out,

**“What Lisman’s letter neglects to mention at any point is a fact that could be considered a glaring omission: Lisman and Scott are already scheduled to have three one-on-one debates.**

**Those debates include one to be held July 29 on WCAX; another Aug. 2 on Vermont PBS; and a third to be heldAug. 3 on Vermont Public Radio.”**

Oops! Better check the schedule next time before you hit send on your hit piece.

Then Lisman asks Phil to give him credit for Phil endorsing 2 commonsense tax proposals that have been around for decades. Phil’s opponent conveniently forgets:

**“It should be noted that many of Lisman’s campaign positions are anything but original. His call for the repeal of Act 46, the school district merger law, is one that has been heard among Republican members of the General Assembly since the bill’s passage in May 2015.**

**His call for the state to shut down Vermont Health Connect and move to the federal exchange is one that has been echoing throughout the halls of the State House for years. His opposition to enacting changes to the state’s gun laws is the same as that held by the current Democratic governor.”**

Sorry Bruce. Lisman clearly has an exaggerated sense of himself if he claims these are his original ideas. At this rate, we need to be sure Lisman doesn't claim he invented the Internet ... or the question mark.

Finally, Lisman continues to spend his Wall Street millions to misrepresent the hard work of Phil and the Republicans serving in the House and Senate. Phil and these legislators have been fighting together to make Vermont a more affordable place. This is why 56 of the 61 Republican legislators have endorsed Phil.

And this is why the Rutland Herald notes Lisman’s ad is, **“... the sort of ad that is common in other states where politics is an ugly and hateful business, and is an indicator of the “new direction” Lisman would like to take Vermont.”**

So, while Bruce becomes more petty and foolish, Phil will keep sharing his ideas for a better Vermont and let the voters decide.

---

Russ isn't afraid to stand up for what he knows is right, even when it isn't popular. He was the sole senator to vote against the USA PATRIOT Act, and one of very few who stood in opposition to the war in Iraq. Russ also took an early and loud stance in support of marriage equality for gay Americans, and he wasn't afraid to work with me, side by side, to get the Affordable Care Act passed -- helping insure millions of Americans.
Russ is an honest, independent-minded public servant who's not driven by what's politically expedient: He's driven by what he knows is right for the people of Wisconsin.
That's why he's been to each of Wisconsin's 72 counties more than once: to listen to the people he's fighting so hard to represent at the U.S. Senate. And that's how we progress as a nation: by listening to the hardworking people of this country -- not corporate special interest groups.
**[The people of Wisconsin have a chance to send a legendary progressive to the U.S. Senate. We have our work cut out for us, but I know that, when we work together for the values we believe in, great things will happen.
Thanks for standing with me,
Barack Obama

name: Bullock HQ
subject: the debate's defining moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

| [](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=7ZisnDccNenLzpIlRkWSDM98VUE%2Bc7Kq)
---

Did you see the debate yesterday? As Steve said, this election isn't about just the next four years -- it's about the kind of Montana we leave for his kids and yours.

On issue after issue -- equal pay for equal work, keeping taxes fair for everyone (not just the wealthiest Montanans and big out-of-state-corporations), investing in public schools, maintaining Montana's ranking as the most fiscally prudent state in the country, protecting the rainy day fund -- Steve showed that he has an in-depth understanding about what makes our state great and how to keep it that way.

It's also clear from the debate that the same can't be said for Mr. Gianforte. **But he does have the ability to keep writing himself six-figure checks so we need everyone to pitch in.[Will you donate $15?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=gZj%2Fn7C3LmlnwrHEhv2U3s98VUE%2Bc7Kq)**

I'd like to quickly highlight the defining moment of the debate. Greg Gianforte was attempting to deflect criticism over the lawsuit he filed against the state to block public stream access on his land and he invited Steve to come fish on his property.

Here was Steve's response: "Thanks for the invitation. But the beauty is, that's a public right of way. I don't need your permission."

Mr. Gianforte simply doesn't understand what public access to lands and streams is all about. It's not his invite to give -- the right to enjoy our public lands and waters is the birthright of all Montanans.

Yesterday, Steve did us proud by standing up for our core Montana values -- this state would look a whole lot different under Greg Gianforte. But while not all Montanans watched the debate, they're being inundated with Mr. Gianforte's TV ads (he put up two new ones just last week). **[Chip in $15 today to ensure voters know what is at stake.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=PWst5kYABYQ5Y7qOq4shRc98VUE%2Bc7Kq)**

Thanks,

Eric Hyers
Campaign Manager

name: John Kasich
subject: Peter, please read this quickly
body:
| Peter -- Now more than ever, we need leaders who advocate for common sense solutions for job creation, smaller government and work every day to create better opportunities for all Americans. **That is why I’m asking you to join me in supporting my friend and our great Senator Rob Portman this year**. [**Please show your support right now with a quick online donation.**](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcontribute.robportman.com%2Fcontribute_rob_for_senate%3Fcampaign_id%3D34aa65a7d7f647ea0f0bd022cbeca4de%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26utm_campaign%3DKasich_01&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kasich_01&n=1 "Donate1")

Rob and I have been friends for more than twenty years. We've worked together to combat Ohio's drug epidemic, restore fiscal responsibility and grow our economy.

Rob’s opponent this year was governor when Ohio lost more than 350,000 jobs, we ranked 48th in job creation, and our rainy day fund was drained to just 89 cents. It was a disaster. **Rob has served Ohio well and I’m asking you to help me send him back to keep fighting for us**. Will you please send Rob a donation of [**$10, $25, $50 or more to help?**](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcontribute.robportman.com%2Fcontribute_rob_for_senate%3Fcampaign_id%3D34aa65a7d7f647ea0f0bd022cbeca4de%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26utm_campaign%3DKasich_01&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kasich_01&n=2 "Donate!") Thank you for your help, Peter. -John **John Kasich**
Governor of Ohio P.S. We’ve set a goal to help Rob raise $20,000 before the end of the quarter on June 30th. Please make sure that you send him a donation of any amount before you do anything else today.****[**You can donate here.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Today's Supreme Court decision (Whole Woman's Health)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Dear friend,
I have always fought to protect a woman's right to make her own health care decisions and decide her own future. That's why I am so pleased that the Supreme Court has ruled to protect that right -- striking down a law that made it virtually impossible for thousands of women to access critical health care services.
This is a victory, but the fight isn't over. Washington Republicans are acting against our families' best interests and pushing a far-right agenda. My opponent, Senator Ayotte, joined other anti-choice politicians like Mitch McConnell and Ted Cruz and voted six times to defund Planned Parenthood -- votes that could have easily taken away access to critical health care for thousands of women.
**[I'll never stop fighting for women's health care rights. Please, join me by signing this petition to tell Washington Republicans that we won't let their extreme agenda stand.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd47d/2a380d31/133eb481/fbf688/3899639162/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/Maggie_WWH?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&source=e20160627_WWH_full")**
It's more important than ever that we all stand united to protect the progress we've made. That's why I will never sit back and let Republicans play politics with women's lives. **[Please, stand with me and put your name down now to say that you will always be a champion for women's health care rights.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd47d/2a380d31/133eb481/fbf688/3899639162/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/Maggie_WWH?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&source=e20160627_WWH_full")**

clean_body: Dear friend, I have always fought to protect a woman's right to make her own health care decisions and decide her own future. That's why I am so pleased that the Supreme Court has ruled to protect that right -- striking down a law that made it virtually impossible for thousands of women to access critical health care services. This is a victory, but the fight isn't over. Washington Republicans are acting against our families' best interests and pushing a far-right agenda. My opponent, Senator Ayotte, joined other anti-choice politicians like Mitch McConnell and Ted Cruz and voted six times to defund Planned Parenthood -- votes that could have easily taken away access to critical health care for thousands of women. "" It's more important than ever that we all stand united to protect the progress we've made. That's why I will never sit back and let Republicans play politics with women's lives. "" With every good wish, Maggie Hassan ""

body:
|

I had to reach out, friend. For over a year now Chris has been running on his proven record as a tireless champion of our values and priorities. Together, with your help this grassroots campaign has come a long way -- but we cannot afford to rest.

Maryland Democrats have learned the hard way that we can't take statewide general elections for granted. Chris's opponent has the support of a Republican SuperPAC funded by Citizens United and Washington Republicans who want to turn this seat RED.

And Washington Republicans have been working hard to fill our opponent's campaign war chest before the end of June. Chris's opponent, a darling of the NRA and gun lobby, has launched a string of fundraisers in recent weeks with right-wing groups determined to stop Chris.

As Chris's Campaign Manager, I'm proud to be working to elect a person with such an incredible history of standing up for our values and getting things done for all of us. **[Now is the time to help ensure Chris gets over the finish line and support our June General Election Fund before Thursday's critical Federal Elections Filing deadline. | Incredible news: the Supreme Court has seen through transparent attempts to limit a woman's right to make her own healthcare decisions. I applaud today's ruling, a powerful vindication that will help ensure that women in Texas -- and across the country -- are able to exercise their right to choose. Whole Woman's Health v. Hellerstedt centered around a Texas law designed to restrict access to safe and legal abortion. This case was not about "protecting" women's health. It was about trying to ban abortion by chipping away at access and undermining women's reproductive freedom. Marco Rubio supported this dangerous, anti-woman's health effort. He wants to ban abortion even in the case of rape or incest. But politicians have no right to put their extreme ideology between a woman and her doctor, threatening access to essential health care services. I will always stand with Florida women and families to protect these basic rights. [And this fight does not end today. We know we have more storms to weather to protect choice. Will you add your name to stand with me for a woman's right to choose?](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c16/738133e4/3674fdc4/7f8282bc/3523055566/VEsE/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e160627/?subsource=ngpattre160627") This country deserves better than GOP politicians like Marco Rubio who threaten women's autonomy. ** _PLEASE READ ABOUT MY FATHER'S PLANS BELOW_** Anyone who knows me knows exactly what I think about Donald J. Trump.

He is an amazing man - there is nobody I admire more. I consider him my best friend, and could not be more proud that he is my father.

[**Today, I am honored to kick off his most ambitious fundraising campaign yet**](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11fOuRFqtvCNAkwgnUT2wc1EY).

The truth is we did better than $11 million and no amount of spin from Crooked Hillary's machine can change that fact. _We cannot let them get away with this_.

**That's why we set another Trump-sized goal**. We are working to shatter records again this week - **by raising _another_ $10 million** before the Federal Election Commission's 2nd quarter fundraising deadline this **Thursday at midnight**. Afterwards, our results will be covered heavily by the media.

[**Join my father and me, and chip in a $10, $20, $50, $100, or $250 contribution today. Will you help us SHOCK Hillary Clinton and the political establishment?**](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11fOyR0LUeYiyjgsfuhofaDKz)

Every day we're reaching more and more people, Peter - **convincing them that a Trump presidency will mean they can _finally_ believe in American again**.

I know that my father has the vision, determination and tenacity to get great things done for our country - something he's proven throughout his life and career. I've worked side by side with him in business, and I've watched him up close in action my entire life.

**Donald J. Trump is the man our nation needs in the White House at this moment. Please help us make history**.

No fight is too tough for my father. He had no problem taking on the political establishment to secure the Republican nomination, _and now he's going after Lying Crooked Hillary Clinton in a way that no one has ever gone after her before_.

[**I hope you will stand with us today by rushing a contribution using this secure link**](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11fOGPHsLHFiugKPYD45H7RVL).

Thank you,

Eric Trump
Executive Vice President
The Trump Organization

Will you stand with me in support of Russ Feingold? | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf434c/1c469400/6d83980/356b4a8/3991713087/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-potus?utm_source=ema_2016-06-27_eoq5_potus_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-06-27_eoq5_potus_nd-rs&utm_campaign=eoq5&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Wisconsin has a long tradition of progressivism, from Fighting Bob La Follette to the legendary Senator Gaylord Nelson, the father of Earth Day. Wisconsinites are independent-minded and forward-thinking, and they're not afraid to go against the grain. **[Russ Feingold embodies the proud tradition of Wisconsin progressives. That's why I'm fighting so hard to make sure that he gets elected in November. Russ isn't afraid to stand up for what he knows is right, even when it isn't popular. He was the sole senator to vote against the USA PATRIOT Act, and one of very few who stood in opposition to the war in Iraq. Russ also took an early and loud stance in support of marriage equality for gay Americans, and he wasn't afraid to work with me, side by side, to get the Affordable Care Act passed -- helping insure millions of Americans.
Russ is an honest, independent-minded public servant who's not driven by what's politically expedient: He's driven by what he knows is right for the people of Wisconsin.
That's why he's been to each of Wisconsin's 72 counties more than once: to listen to the people he's fighting so hard to represent at the U.S. Senate. And that's how we progress as a nation: by listening to the hardworking people of this country -- not corporate special interest groups.
**[The people of Wisconsin have a chance to send a legendary progressive to the U.S. Senate. Stand with me and join Team Russ with a contribution of $5.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf434c/1c469400/6d83980/356b4a8/3991713087/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-potus?utm_source=ema_2016-06-27_eoq5_potus_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-06-27_eoq5_potus_nd-rs&utm_campaign=eoq5&utm_medium=ema")**
We have our work cut out for us, but I know that, when we work together for the values we believe in, great things will happen.
Thanks for standing with me,
Barack Obama

name: Jay Inslee
subject: One year ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
We're fighting for full equality. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=OTExOTA1OAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTQyNjQxMTc4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
| Dear Friend, One year ago, we were celebrating a big victory after the Supreme Court ruled marriage equality the law of the land. That was a truly historic day for our country -- one that affirmed our values of equality, inclusion, and freedom. I'm proud that Washington state practices our values. A prime example is our landmark, decade-old nondiscrimination law that protects LGBTQ individuals from discrimination. But Washington Republicans are threatening to overturn those protections with I-1515, an initiative that would allow public and private institutions to force trans individuals to use the bathroom facilities of their gender at birth, regardless of gender identity. **Let 's call this what it is: I-1515 is a sham. It's a disgrace. It's offensive to our values.** I-1515 threatens Washington's businesses and residents. Individuals in the LGBTQ community are at a higher risk for harassment, abuse, and violence -- and these types of policies would exacerbate that. This initiative is introducing a terrible, discriminatory solution to a nonexistent problem. It's not inclusive, it's not tolerant, and it doesn't represent Washington's values. [**Please, sign my petition today affirming LGBTQ pride by showing your strong support for the LGBTQ nondiscrimination law. If I-1515 gets on the ballot in November, I 'm going to ask for your help to fight it.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=OTExOTA1OAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTQyNjQxMTc4S0&mt=1&rt=0) [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=OTExOTA1OAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTQyNjQxMTc4S0&mt=1&rt=0) I'm proud of the progress we've made here in Washington state, and I'm proud to have joined LGBTQ friends to march in the Seattle Pride Parade. But this year our pride parade didn't kick off with a momentous Supreme Court decision. Instead, we are celebrating pride as we continue to grieve and mark the tragedy in Orlando. These senseless acts of violence reminded us of just how far we have to go to ensure full equality in this country. We can be truly proud of our Washington values today. But we can do better. We can continue the march for equality. And we must preserve important measures we already have, like our nondiscrimination law. [**Add your name today in support of our nondiscrimination law.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=OTExOTA1OAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTQyNjQxMTc4S0&mt=1&rt=0) Thank you for standing up for our Washington values today. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [**SIGN ON »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=OTExOTA1OAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTQyNjQxMTc4S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: I hope you'll say yes
body:
Don't say no to this! | Friend --

I have a very special invitation for you this week, and I hope you’ll say yes:

**[Will you be my guest to see Hamilton on Broadway? All you have to do is add your name for a chance for you and a guest to meet me at the show.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU4NDcxNDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODI0MTU2MzcwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

The best moments of our nation’s history teach us that anyone can smash every expectation we have for them and shape the course of our collective history. In 2016, that lesson feels more pointed than ever, so it’s no wonder this remarkable piece of theater has captured the imaginations of people all over America. This is a show about who we are, about our potential as a nation, about our dreams for our country and our children.

I want to experience that with you -- it’s why we’ve been so persistent over the last few days!

The campaign will cover your hotel and travel, so all you’ll have to worry about is keeping up with all those lyrics! (I really love “Non-Stop” -- we should have more songs about the Federalist Papers.)

**Enter now for a chance for you and a guest to win. Don’t say no to this!**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU4NDcxNDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODI0MTU2MzcwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Hillary

|

Maggie's counting on you, so please, use this link to donate directly to her campaign: "" Thanks for doing your part, Marc Goldberg Campaign Manager, Maggie for NH ""

body:
President Obama sent you an email today. | Friend, President Obama sent you an email today and I wanted to make sure you got a chance to read it. I want to remind you what's at stake -- right here in Wisconsin, and across America. Right now, we have a chance to make a difference. We can protect President Obama's legacy of progress, of opportunity for ALL Americans. We can work together to take our country back from the right-wing special interest groups that have dominated our national politics with millions of dollars, and put it back where it belongs: in the hands of the people. **[I'm humbled to have President Obama in my corner. So, now I'm asking: Can you step up with a contribution of $5 today? We're getting closer and closer to our goal of raising $250,000, and I know we can get there with your help.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf434e/1c469400/6c729f4/356b2f6/3316277743/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-potus?utm_source=ema_2016-06-27_eoq6_RF_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-27_eoq6_RF_nd&utm_campaign=eoq6&utm_medium=ema")** Don't miss President Obama's email below, and thanks for being in my corner. Sincerely, Russ Feingold \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Barack Obama
Date: Mon, June 27, 2016
Subject: Wisconsin progressivism [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf434e/1c469400/6c729f4/356b2f6/3316277743/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-potus?utm_source=ema_2016-06-27_eoq6_RF_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-27_eoq6_RF_nd&utm_campaign=eoq6&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Wisconsin has a long tradition of progressivism, from Fighting Bob La Follette to the legendary Senator Gaylord Nelson, the father of Earth Day. Wisconsinites are independent-minded and forward-thinking, and they're not afraid to go against the grain. **[Russ Feingold embodies the proud tradition of Wisconsin progressives. That's why I'm fighting so hard to make sure that he gets elected in November. Will you stand with me in support of his campaign with a contribution of $5?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf434e/1c469400/6c729f4/356b2f6/3316277743/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-potus?utm_source=ema_2016-06-27_eoq6_RF_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-27_eoq6_RF_nd&utm_campaign=eoq6&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf434e/1c469400/6c729f4/356b2f6/3316277743/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-potus?utm_source=ema_2016-06-27_eoq6_RF_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-27_eoq6_RF_nd&utm_campaign=eoq6&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf434e/1c469400/6c729f4/356b2f6/3316277743/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-potus?utm_source=ema_2016-06-27_eoq6_RF_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-27_eoq6_RF_nd&utm_campaign=eoq6&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf434e/1c469400/6c729f4/356b2f7/3316277743/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-potus?utm_source=ema_2016-06-27_eoq6_RF_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-27_eoq6_RF_nd&utm_campaign=eoq6&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

Russ isn't afraid to stand up for what he knows is right, even when it isn't popular. He was the sole senator to vote against the USA PATRIOT Act, and one of very few who stood in opposition to the war in Iraq. Russ also took an early and loud stance in support of marriage equality for gay Americans, and he wasn't afraid to work with me, side by side, to get the Affordable Care Act passed -- helping insure millions of Americans.
Russ is an honest, independent-minded public servant who's not driven by what's politically expedient: He's driven by what he knows is right for the people of Wisconsin.
That's why he's been to each of Wisconsin's 72 counties more than once: to listen to the people he's fighting so hard to represent at the U.S. Senate. And that's how we progress as a nation: by listening to the hardworking people of this country -- not corporate special interest groups.
**[The people of Wisconsin have a chance to send a legendary progressive to the U.S. Senate. Stand with me and join Team Russ with a contribution of $5.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf434e/1c469400/6c729f4/356b2f6/3316277743/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-potus?utm_source=ema_2016-06-27_eoq6_RF_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-27_eoq6_RF_nd&utm_campaign=eoq6&utm_medium=ema")**
We have our work cut out for us, but I know that, when we work together for the values we believe in, great things will happen.
Thanks for standing with me,
Barack Obama
